allow: Bash(.claude/commands/scripts/query-appinsights.sh "traces | where timestamp > ago\(5m\) | where message has ''initialized with'' or message has ''Managed Identity'' or message has ''connection string'' or message has ''not configured'' or message has ''Table Storage'' or message has ''Blob Storage'' | project timestamp, message, severityLevel | order by timestamp desc | take 20" PT1H)
Bash(.claude/commands/scripts/query-appinsights.sh "exceptions | where timestamp > ago\(5m\) | project timestamp, outerMessage, innermostMessage, problemId | order by timestamp desc | take 10" PT1H)

Bash(.claude/commands/scripts/query-appinsights.sh "traces | where timestamp > ago\(5m\) | where message startswith ''Executed'' | project timestamp, message, operation_Name | order by timestamp desc | take 5" PT1H)

Bash(.claude/commands/scripts/query-appinsights.sh "traces | where timestamp > ago\(5m\) | where message startswith ''Executed'' | where message contains ''Failed'' | project timestamp, message, operation_Name | order by timestamp desc | take 10" PT1H)

Bash(.claude/commands/scripts/query-appinsights.sh "traces | where timestamp > ago\(10m\) | where message has ''initialized'' or message has ''Initializing'' | project timestamp, message, severityLevel | order by timestamp desc | take 20" PT1H)

Bash(.claude/commands/scripts/query-appinsights.sh "traces | where timestamp between \(datetime\(2026-03-28T03:53:45Z\) .. datetime\(2026-03-28T03:53:55Z\)\) | project timestamp, message, severityLevel | order by timestamp asc | take 50" PT1H)

Bash(.claude/commands/scripts/query-appinsights.sh "traces | where timestamp > datetime\(2026-03-28T03:53:00Z\) | where message startswith ''Executed'' | extend status = iif\(message contains ''Succeeded'', ''Succeeded'', ''Failed''\) | summarize total=count\(\), failed=countif\(status == ''Failed''\) by operation_Name | where failed > 0 | order by failed desc" PT1H)
